UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user (buyer) within the CursoDigital application, storing their profile information.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserProfile entity.

firstName.description: The first name of the user.

lastName.description: The last name of the user.

registrationDate.description: The date and time when the user registered.

ExternalPlatform.title: ExternalPlatform
ExternalPlatform.description: Represents an external course hosting platform (e.g., Kwify, Ticto) where courses are originally located.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ExternalPlatform entity.

name.description: The name of the external platform (e.g., 'Kwify', 'Ticto').

baseUrl.description: The base URL for the external platform, for informational purposes.

imageUrl.description: A URL for the platform's logo or representative image.

description.description: A brief description of the external platform.

Course.title: Course
Course.description: Represents a course available for purchase in the CursoDigital application catalog.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Course entity.

title.description: The title of the course as displayed in CursoDigital.

description.description: A detailed description of the course content and learning objectives. This can be assisted by the GenAI tool.

price.description: The selling price of the course in CursoDigital.

externalPlatformId.description: Reference to the ExternalPlatform where this course is hosted. (Relationship: ExternalPlatform 1:N Course)

externalCourseIdentificationStrings.description: A list of strings (e.g., exact course names, module titles) used on the external platform to identify this course. This helps in mapping to ExternalAccountCredentials.

ExternalAccountCredential.title: ExternalAccountCredential
ExternalAccountCredential.description: Represents a login credential (e.g., email and password) for an ExternalPlatform that grants access to a specific set of courses. This is the 'base de dados' injected by administrators.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ExternalAccountCredential entity.

externalPlatformId.description: Reference to the ExternalPlatform this credential belongs to. (Relationship: ExternalPlatform 1:N ExternalAccountCredential)

accessIdentifier.description: The primary identifier for this external account (e.g., email address, username). The application layer is responsible for securely handling sensitive credentials associated with this identifier, such as passwords, which are NOT stored in this data model.

providedCourseTitles.description: A list of course titles or identifying strings that this specific external account credential grants access to on the external platform, as provided by the administrator.

adminNotes.description: Internal notes for administrators regarding this credential, e.g., 'Config By: @pjcontas'.

CourseRequest.title: CourseRequest
CourseRequest.description: Represents a course requested by a user that is not yet in the catalog.

courseName.description: The name of the requested course.

userId.description: ID of the user who requested.

params.name: userProfileId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user.

definition.description: Stores definitions of external course hosting platforms.

params.name: platformId
params.description: The unique identifier for an external course platform.

params.name: courseId
params.description: The unique identifier for a course.

params.name: credentialId
params.description: The unique identifier for an external account credential entry.

params.name: requestId
params.description: The unique identifier for a request.
